ddls:
CREATE TABLE "auth_configurations" (
  "config_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each configuration */,
  "option_name" TEXT /* Name of the configuration option */,
  "type" TEXT /* Type of the configuration (e.g., String, Unsigned Integer) */,
  "default_value" TEXT /* Default value for the configuration option */,
  "regex" TEXT /* Regular expression for validation (if applicable) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of what the configuration option does */,
  "config_status" TEXT /* Status of the configuration (e.g., active, inactive) */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the configuration */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the configuration was created */,
  "updated_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who last updated the configuration */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the configuration was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("config_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username chosen by the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "hashed_password" TEXT /* Hashed password for authentication */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., admin, developer, auditor) */,
  "first_name" TEXT /* First name of the user */,
  "last_name" TEXT /* Last name of the user */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the user */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Timestamp of the user's last login */,
  "account_status" TEXT /* Status of the user's account (e.g., active, locked, disabled) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "auth_attempts" (
  "attempt_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each authentication attempt */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user attempting authentication */,
  "attempt_time" TEXT /* Timestamp of the authentication attempt */,
  "success" INTEGER /* Whether the authentication was successful */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address from which the attempt was made */,
  "attempt_source" TEXT /* Description of the source from which the attempt was made (e.g., web, mobile app) */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* User agent string of the client making the attempt */,
  "device_id" TEXT /* Unique identifier of the device used for the attempt */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("attempt_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_auth_attempts_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "nonce_storage" (
  "nonce_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each nonce */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the associated user */,
  "nonce" TEXT /* The nonce value */,
  "expiration_time" TEXT /* Expiration timestamp of the nonce */,
  "nonce_status" TEXT /* Status of the nonce (e.g., valid, expired, used) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the nonce was created */,
  "used_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the nonce was last used */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("nonce_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_nonce_storage_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "roles" (
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each role */,
  "role_name" TEXT /* Name of the role */,
  "permissions" TEXT /* List of permissions associated with the role */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the role */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the role was created */,
  "updated_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who last updated the role */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the role was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "permission_logs" (
  "log_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each log entry */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user making the change */,
  "role_id" INTEGER /* ID of the role being changed */,
  "change_time" TEXT /* Timestamp of the change */,
  "action" TEXT /* Description of the action taken */,
  "old_permissions" TEXT /* List of permissions before the change */,
  "new_permissions" TEXT /* List of permissions after the change */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("log_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_permission_logs_role_id FOREIGN KEY ("role_id") REFERENCES roles ("role_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_permission_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "security_settings" (
  "setting_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each setting */,
  "setting_name" TEXT /* Name of the security setting */,
  "value" TEXT /* Value assigned to the setting */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the setting */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the setting was created */,
  "updated_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who last updated the setting */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the setting was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("setting_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "audit_logs" (
  "audit_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each audit log */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user performing the action */,
  "action" TEXT /* Description of the action performed */,
  "action_time" TEXT /* Timestamp of the action */,
  "details" TEXT /* Additional details about the action */,
  "source_ip" TEXT /* IP address from which the action was performed */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* User agent string of the client performing the action */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("audit_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_audit_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "password_history" (
  "history_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each password history entry */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user to whom the password belongs */,
  "hashed_password" TEXT /* Hashed password value */,
  "change_time" TEXT /* Timestamp when the password was changed */,
  "expiration_time" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the password will expire */,
  "is_expired" INTEGER /* Boolean to indicate if the password has expired */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("history_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_password_history_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "session_management" (
  "session_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each session */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user associated with the session */,
  "session_token" TEXT /* Token used for the session */,
  "start_time" TEXT /* Start time of the session */,
  "end_time" TEXT /* End time of the session */,
  "last_activity_time" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last activity during the session */,
  "session_status" TEXT /* Status of the session (e.g., active, expired, terminated) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("session_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_session_management_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "configuration_audit" (
  "audit_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each audit log entry */,
  "config_id" INTEGER /* ID of the configuration being changed */,
  "previous_value" TEXT /* Previous value of the configuration */,
  "new_value" TEXT /* New value of the configuration */,
  "change_time" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the change was made */,
  "changed_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who made the change */,
  "reason" TEXT /* Description of the reason for the change */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("audit_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_configuration_audit_config_id FOREIGN KEY ("config_id") REFERENCES auth_configurations ("config_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "failed_authentication_notifications" (
  "notification_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each notification */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who failed authentication */,
  "attempt_id" INTEGER /* ID of the authentication attempt */,
  "timestamp" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the notification was created */,
  "notification_type" TEXT /* Type of notification (e.g., email, SMS, push notification) */,
  "sent_to" TEXT /* Recipient of the notification (e.g., email address, phone number) */,
  "sent_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the notification was sent */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("notification_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_failed_authentication_notifications_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_failed_authentication_notifications_attempt_id FOREIGN KEY ("attempt_id") REFERENCES auth_attempts ("attempt_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "session_logs" (
  "session_log_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each session log entry */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user associated with the session */,
  "session_id" INTEGER /* ID of the session */,
  "log_time" TEXT /* Timestamp of the activity */,
  "activity" TEXT /* Description of the activity performed during the session */,
  "activity_type" TEXT /* Type of activity (e.g., login, logout, action) */,
  "activity_details" TEXT /* Additional details about the activity */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("session_log_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_session_logs_session_id FOREIGN KEY ("session_id") REFERENCES session_management ("session_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_session_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)
